sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Blood does not become water».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ رَوَابِطَ الأُسْرَةِ قَوِيَّةٌ وَلَا تَنْقَطِعُ.
sentences.translation: To znači da su porodične veze jake i ne prekidaju se.
sentences.translationEn: This means that family bonds are strong and do not break.

sentences.translation: Braća su se posvađala ali su se pomirila.
sentences.translationEn: The brothers argued but they made up and reconciled.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الأُمُّ: «أَنْتُمَا إِخْوَةٌ وَالأُسْرَةُ أَهَمُّ مِنَ الْخِلَافِ».
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: «Vi ste braća i porodica je važnija od svađe».
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: «You are brothers and family is more important than a quarrel».
